commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a CLI-only Gateway lane-busy opt-in, command-queue wait rejection metadata, structured Gateway final payloads, CLI stderr/JSON handling, and queue/Gateway/CLI regression tests.

PR surface: Source +246, Tests +210. Total +456 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue and PR body provide a clear source path plus before/after terminal proof from a real local Gateway service and two source-entrypoint CLI processes; I did not run it locally because this review is read-only.
